chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ الْأَحْلَامِ وَ الْحُجَّةِ عَلَى أَهْلِ ذَلِكَ الزَّمَانِ
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF THE DREAM AND THE PROOF UPON THE PEOPLE OF THAT ERA

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 205)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 205)
text: الرُّؤْيَا عَلَى ثَلَاثَةِ وُجُوهٍ بِشَارَةٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ وَ تَحْذِيرٍ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ وَ أَضْغَاثِ أَحْلَامٍ.

en.hubeali: H 14509 – Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Sa’d Bin Abu Khalaf, who has narrated the following:
Abu Abdullahasws has said that the dreams are of three aspects - Good News from Allahazwj for the Believer, and a caution against the Satanla, and confused dreams’.
en.sarwar: 61. Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Sa’d Bin Abu Khalaf, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) has said that the dreams are of three aspects - Good News from Allah (azwj) for the Believer, and a caution against the Satan (la), and confused dreams’.
